title: iberis intermedia subsp. durandii
intro: Iberis intermedia subsp. durandii, also known as Dwarf Candytuft, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dwarf Candytuft include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
